ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "sub_id" INTEGER /* Sub-identifier for the site */,
  "site_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the site */,
  "dow_sub_id" INTEGER /* Dow Sub-identifier for the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site in meters */,
  "basin_area" REAL /* Basin area of the site in square kilometers */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the site (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "establish_date" TEXT /* Date the site was established */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the site data was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the site */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the site (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* The current maintenance status of the site (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* The date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* The scheduled date for the next maintenance */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., river, stream, lake) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_levels" (
  "water_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water level measurement */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "water_level" REAL /* Water level measurement value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., meters, feet) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual) */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor used for the measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the measurement */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("water_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_levels_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flow_rates" (
  "flow_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow rate measurement */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "flow_rate" REAL /* Flow rate measurement value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cubic meters per second, cubic feet per second) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual) */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor used for the measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the measurement */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flow_rates_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality" (
  "water_quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water quality measurement */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter measured (e.g., pH, dissolved oxygen, turbidity) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual) */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor used for the measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the measurement */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("water_quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the data was recorded */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor used for the measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the measurement */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_logout_date" TEXT /* Date of the last logout */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the site data */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the site data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, monthly, alert) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, reviewed, approved) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the report (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User ID of the person assigned to review the report */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who reviewed the report */,
  "reviewed_date" TEXT /* Date the report was reviewed */,
  "reviewed_time" TEXT /* Time the report was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
